Formal.description: Professional and respectful tone. Use full sentences, avoid contractions, maintain formality throughout. Suitable for clients, managers, and external stakeholders.
Formal.example_opening:
Dear [Name],

Thank you for your email.

Friendly.description: Warm, approachable, and conversational tone. Use contractions, be personable, and add light positive language where appropriate. Suitable for colleagues and familiar contacts.
Friendly.example_opening:
Hi [Name],

Thanks so much for reaching out!

Concise.description: Direct and brief. Get to the point in as few words as possible. No filler phrases, no small talk, no unnecessary context. Every sentence must carry information.
